name: Basic White Sauce & Cheese Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat butter in a small non-stick skillet, then add arrowroot.
2. Gradually add milk, stirring until the sauce thickens.
3. Stir in salt and white pepper.
Variations:
- For thicker sauce: Add more butter and arrowroot for each cup of milk.
- Cheese Sauce: Add 1/4 cup shredded low-fat cheese to hot sauce; stir until melted.
